query: SELECT trelloId, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as card_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(name) as names FROM atis_cards GROUP BY trelloId HAVING cnt > 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zdYySmWxto697z.f7331094e4e6 --database 8WaJog2pAVrGepmXoS2wYU --execute SELECT trelloId, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id) as card_ids, GROUP_CONCAT(name) as names FROM atis_cards GROUP BY trelloId HAVING cnt > 1;
